title: habenella alata
intro: Habenella alata, also known as Indian snakeroot or Chakranishi, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Habenella alata include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Habenella alata is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to balance the body's energies.
